9.reason: Error: Cannot initialize struct members in C (C99 or later allows this only in certain contexts, but this is not standard C; should be initialized in code)

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Cannot initialize struct members in C (C99/C11 does not allow this). This is a C++ feature.
